THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT PIERCE, CASSANDRA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT CARROLL JR, THEODIS FROM THE EVIDENCE AND TESTIMONY PRESENTED THE COURT IS UNABLE TO DETERMINE THAT ANY AGREEMENT EXISTED BETWEEN THE PARTIES TO SHARE OR REIMBURSE EACH OTHER FOR JOINT EXPENSES. THE COURT CONCLUDES THAT PROPERTY PURCHASED OR EXPENSES PAID BY THE PARTIES WERE DONE IN THE FURTHERANCE OF THEIR EXISTING RELATIONSHIP WITHOUT OBLIGATION TO REIMBURSE OR REPAY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
